description: The S.H.I.E.L.D. team reminisces over fallen comrade Trip, sharing stories that underline their grief and loyalty. Meanwhile, Mack quietly communicates progress on a secret process involving Coulson’s toolbox with Morse, hinting at a hidden agenda within the team. The episode closes with a melancholic yet hopeful tone as the team copes with loss and prepares for the future.

transcript.line: Or that time when Trip tossed me the mag on the burnside raid and it fell down the sewer grate.
Yeah, what did he say again?
Did he ever tell you about the time his grandpa took him to grandfather mountain when he was a child in North Carolina?
Well, he gets there, and they pull up to the gate...
I have visual confirmation. Fury's toolbox is locked in Coulson's office.
Did you manage to wrangle the blueprints from the base?
Yeah, we're almost good to go.
And he says, “I'm sorry, grandpa. I thought you owned the whole mountain.” He'd be mad I told you that story.
We're gonna laugh a lot less... that's for sure.
